{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Chief Guardians of Dreadnought City
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Chief Guardians of Dreadnought City]] are ancient Archlords.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
